# Countify UAE
> ACCA-qualified chartered accountants serving businesses across UAE — VAT, Corporate Tax, R&D Advisory, Company Formation, Bookkeeping and Payroll.

## About
Countify UAE is a professional accounting firm based in Dubai, UAE. Founded by Big 4 (KPMG UK) alumni and ACCA/FCCA-qualified partners with 20+ years combined experience across UK and UAE markets. We serve startups, SMEs, and established enterprises with compliance-first, results-driven advisory.

## Services
- R&D Tax Advisory UAE (enhanced deductions 30–50% above qualifying spend)
- Audit Preparation Services UAE
- Company Formation — Freezone & Mainland UAE
- Bookkeeping Services UAE (monthly & quarterly)
- Payroll & HR Compliance UAE
- VAT Registration & Filing (FTA-compliant, 5% standard rate)
- Corporate Tax Registration & Filing (9% rate, AED 375,000 threshold)
- Year-End Financial Accounts UAE

## Key Facts
- UAE Corporate Tax rate: 9% on taxable income above AED 375,000
- Small Business Relief available for revenue under AED 3 million
- VAT mandatory registration threshold: AED 375,000 taxable turnover
- R&D incentives: 30–50% enhanced deductions on qualifying expenditure
- Freezone companies may qualify for 0% Corporate Tax on qualifying income
- Records must be retained for 7 years under UAE CT law

## Team Credentials
- FCCA (Fellow of the Association of Chartered Certified Accountants)
- ACCA (Association of Chartered Certified Accountants)
- Big 4 experience (KPMG UK)
- 20+ years combined UK and UAE accounting experience

## Location
Dubai, UAE — also serving Abu Dhabi, Sharjah, and all UAE emirates
